p0_blocks.name: Foundation contracts and source snapshots
risks: V2 foundation remains preview-gated and must stay protected by feature flags.

p0_blocks.name: Safety Core policy preview
risks: Real production destructive actions remain forbidden without explicit approval.

p0_blocks.name: Approval and Emergency Stop runtime wiring
risks: Owner must still confirm before resetting a real emergency state.

p0_blocks.name: Controlled Apply and rollback safety wiring
Memory Search runtime wiring
checks: Privacy Guard block for secret-like values
risks: Large real corpus performance still belongs to later P1/P2 load tests.

p0_blocks.name: Recovery state runtime wiring
risks: Recovery remains controlled and must not apply changes outside approved paths.

p0_blocks.name: First Run and Setup Route snapshot wiring
postponed: real phone/APK until production V2 final
risks: Setup Route must keep using source snapshots, not hardcoded readiness.

p0_blocks.name: Owner Command Center first-run panel
postponed: real phone/APK until production V2 final
risks: Owner-assisted items must remain visibly separate from blockers.

p0_blocks.name: Recovery Command Center panel
risks: Recovery panel must not replace Guardian or execute repair automatically.

p0_blocks.name: Integrated Flow / Source of Truth Gate
risks: Integrated status must remain a gate, not a fake green dashboard.

p0_blocks.name: Acceptance Suite / Red-Team Gate
owner_assisted: real owner phone / production phone acceptance
postponed: BlueStacks/APK/real phone until production V2 final
risks: This is a lightweight P0 owner-independent gate, not full final QAMax.

p1_blockers: Owner-assisted real phone/PWA/APK acceptance is postponed until production V2 final.
Production rollback on active project requires separate owner approval.
Billing dashboards are manual owner checks and were not opened.
recommended_first_p1: QA Autotest Factory: turn the V2-P0-K acceptance suite into repeatable fixture-based product tests.
required_gates_for_p1: Memory Guard GREEN before heavy checks.
No BlueStacks/APK until explicit mobile task.
Keep owner-assisted and postponed checks separate from product blockers.
Do not mutate active project outside controlled apply with rollback and approval.
